title: Vanilla Waypoints
description: This mod adds tooltips for bundle's menus for items that had been renamed using an anvil.
body: Vanilla Waypoints is a simple mod that adds a grid displayed tooltip on bundle's hover menu. The mod aims for giving the player the most vanilla way of making an usable gui for vanilla waypoints(currently **magnetic compasses**). It works by displaying the **custom name** of items that had been **renamed** in an anvil previously, organized in the tooltip grid so it matches the order that the items are being displayed. In future versions it will use mixins to display the name right below the item, so consider this version of the mod a preview.
